# v1


---

### Timestamp

Timestamp represents a point in time.

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>seconds</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>int64</code><br/><br/>seconds is the number of seconds since Unix epoch.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>nanos</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>int32</code><br/><br/>nanos is the non-negative fractions of a second.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

### ValidationFailure

ValidationFailure describes a single field-level validation error.

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>field</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>field is the dot-separated path of the field that failed validation.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>reason</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>reason is a human-readable explanation of the violated constraint.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

### Recipient

Recipient identifies who should receive a notification.

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Name</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}></th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>user_id</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><code>string</code><br/><br/>user_id is the internal identifier of the user.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>email</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><span style={{fontSize:'0.75rem',background:'#059669',color:'white',padding:'2px 8px',borderRadius:'4px',marginRight:'0.5rem'}}>optional</span> <code>string</code><br/><br/>email is the recipient's email address.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>phone</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}><span style={{fontSize:'0.75rem',background:'#059669',color:'white',padding:'2px 8px',borderRadius:'4px',marginRight:'0.5rem'}}>optional</span> <code>string</code><br/><br/>phone is the recipient's phone number in E.164 format.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>


---

### DeliveryStatus

DeliveryStatus represents the delivery state of a notification.

<table style={{width:'100%',borderCollapse:'collapse'}}>
<thead><tr style={{borderBottom:'2px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.3)'}}>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600,width:'30%'}}>Value</th>
<th style={{textAlign:'left',padding:'8px 12px',fontWeight:600}}>Description</th>
</tr></thead>
<tbody>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>DELIVERY_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}>DELIVERY_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED is the default unspecified status.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>PENDING</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}>PENDING means the notification has been queued but not yet delivered.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>DELIVERED</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}>DELIVERED means the notification was successfully sent to the recipient.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>FAILED</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}>FAILED means the delivery attempt failed.</td>
</tr>
<tr style={{borderBottom:'1px solid rgba(125,125,125,0.15)'}}>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px',verticalAlign:'top',whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}><code>READ</code></td>
<td style={{padding:'8px 12px'}}>READ means the recipient has read the notification.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
